feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Value of custom fields not shown in list FAGLB03
entry.content:
Hello,

Since our upgrade we have an issue in showing the values of 2 custom fields in the view of transaction FAGLB03.

The columns are shown, but the values are not displayed. I are just emtpy fields. By double clicking on a line, the details are shown, there the values are shown correctly.

The custom fields are included in FAGLPOSX.

How can I fix this issue? Thanks!

entry.title: IP10 Maintenance schedule plan process
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are currently facing issue in IP10 transaction while scheduling maintenance plans. 
When the start date of call is in previous year, we could see system is creating calls from previous year. But the calls are getting creted based on scheduling period and it is taking current year as basis and scheduling calls.
This is causing calls scheduled even after End date of scheduling as calls are getting started from current year.

For example, 

For below we could see calls are scheduled form 2023 to 2028. But as scheduling period is 3YR, system is considering current year 2025 3 which is till 2028 to schedule calls.

Call Horizon      : 30 Day
Scheduling period : 3 YR
Cycle             : 12 MO and 6 MO
Start of cycle    : 01.01.2023
End date for sch. : 31.12.2030
Strategy          : FTMA05

In the below case, we could see calls are scheduled form 2023 to 2031. But as scheduling period is 6YR, system is considering current year 2025 6 which is till 2031 to schedule calls. But as end date of scheduling is 2031, business are expecting no calls after 2030 (end date of scheduling). 

Call Horizon      : 30 Day
Scheduling period : 6 YR
Cycle             : 12 MO and 6 MO
Start of cycle    : 01.01.2023
End date for sch. : 31.12.2030
Strategy          : FTMA05

Please let us know if the above is standard behavior. If yes, We need your inputs on how to setup the calls to consider the start of cycle date (not the current date) and  to stop the calls at the end date of scheduling.

entry.title: SUM:MAIN_NEWBAS/JOB_RSUPGCUA_PROD failed
entry.content:
Using SUM to upgrade ECC 6.0, I got this error message:  

This is a Clone Environment 

The execution percentage is 74%

{ 

Checks after phase MAIN_NEWBAS/JOB_RSUPGCUA_PROD were negative!

Last error code set: 

RFC system <SID> nr 01 function "SUBST_START_BATCHJOB" 

RFC failed with code 3 key SYNTAX_ERROR: 

Syntax error in program SAPLSVAR } 

Does any one have any idea?

entry.title: IE02 Merkmale vervielfacht
entry.content:
unsere Medizintechnik hat gemeldet, dass nach dem Einspielen des Patches ein Fehler aufgefallen ist. Interessanterweise tritt dieser jedoch nicht in allen Geräten auf, was ungewöhnlich erscheint. Zum Vergleich habe ich identische Geräte in unseren ERK/ERP  und SB2 (hier wurde kein Patch installiert) überprüft, und dabei Folgendes festgestellt:

Im Gerät z. B. 3060235 EQ IE02 im gepatchten ERK/ERP unter Klassenübersicht der Merkmalbezeichnung zeigt im Tab „Allgemein“ den Wert 232 Stück

(die Werte wiederholen sich!) und im Tab „IT-Daten“ 109, wobei zusätzliche leere Felder vorhanden sind. Also es gibt unter Merkmalsbezeichnung mehr Einträge als vor dem letzten Patch. Bei IT-Daten gibt es dann leere Felder. Die Anwender sagen sie hätten keine Merkmale hinzugefügt

entry.title: Problem in OABC
entry.content:
Dear SAP,


Why in OABC is it available to set “Adoption of Values from Depreciation Area” as “empty” (00) for entries that is flagged in OADB as “4-Area Posts APC Immediately and Depreciation”?


<see file attached>


Why it is not possible to set “Adoption of Values from Depreciation Area” as “empty” (00) for entries that in OADB as “3- Area Posts Depreciation Only”?


What is  the main difference between option 3- Area Posts Depreciation Only”and “4-Area Posts APC Immediately and Depreciation” on AA side?


Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Missing fields and changed field names after upgrade from EHP6 to EHP8
entry.content:
There are lot of changes in field names found after upgrade of SAP ECC from EHP6 to EHP8. We are using SAP for retail stores business. Some of field name change are shown below.

Sr. No. Field name in Version - EHP 6               Field name in Version EHP 8
i. Vendor                                                             Supplier
ii. Article                                                              Material
iii. Site                                                                 Plant
iv. Mdse Category                                               Material Group

Also, field Transportation chain which was visible earlier in EHP6 is not visible on screen in Purchase Info records. Transaction - ME11/ME12/ME13.

entry.title: Split the dunning by type of correspondence
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a new requirement to be able to run the dunning process by type of communication method at customer level.

Currently we have as delivery method Email and Letter, so we would like to separate the Dunning Runs per type of communication at Customer Level?

This is something that can be implemented or is there a solution workaround that can be done allow this requirement?

Thanks and regards

 

Thanks,

 

 

 

PERSON_NAME 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Subcontracting providing components to the vendor (SD > MM)
entry.content:
have a scenario where:

When a customer requests a sales material X, I provide components X1 and X2 to a subcontractor, who then completes material X and delivers it directly.

How would you resolve this?

I believe the ideal approach is:

  • Creation of a Sales Order with material X.
  • Automatic creation of a Purchase Requisition (PR) with the subcontractor vendor determined automatically.
  • Automatic creation of a Purchase Order (PO) (using RM06BB30) from the PR with the BOM of material X exploded.

Have you implemented something like this? Do you think this is the most appropriate approach? 

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Why am i getting this error when trying to enter a Debit Memo? Message no. YSA1046
entry.content:
I have previously entered debits and credits against this customer. Now when I am trying to create a debit ZDR; once I enter the Sold to Account I get the error:

Sales order cannot be processed. Check customer type.

Message no. YSA1046

Where do I check the customer type? How do i fix this? What caused it since I havent experienced the behavior previously? Thank you.

entry.title: Documentation for SAP 40B Upgrade to ECC 6.0 EHP3
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am in a situation where I have to upgrade an old version of SAP to SAP ECC EHP6.  Per SAP, the direct path of 40B --> SAP ECC EHP3 is supported.  I have the documentation I could find from SAP, but the basic step-by-step guide--that's available for later upgrades, say ECC EHP3 to ECC EHP6-- is not available for this upgrade path.  SAP has confirmed that there are no more official documents available from their end and what's on the website is all there is.

If anyone has any step-by-step or the best, any SAP type media or documents that would give step-by-step or provide any input, I would greatly appreciate it.   I already reached out to book sellers, and none have the old versions of books and neither does Ebay.  

Greatly appreciate any help.

entry.title: Data not saved outside enhancement tab in work order
entry.content:
Please advise on why the insert/change in data made in the Enhancement Tab for IW32 is not being saved if “Save” button is clicked on the other tabs outside of the Enhancement Tab. Is it possible to have an auto-populate logic on the field that is in Enhancement Tab without going to the Enhancement Tab.


Currently, we have a custom field called LAFD and it sits in the Enhancement Tab. This field does not get updated when the enhancement tab is not accessed before saving the order.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Create BP in S4 through ECC CREMAS05 - BUT000-BPEXT
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I currently face the challenge to migrate ECC vendors to S4 Business Partners.

Some requirements force us to add a prefix to the BP number compared to the ECC number (example ECC vendor 1234 will be S4 BP 51234)

The original ECC vendor number should be stored in BUT000-BPEXT field.

Is there any way to handle this in standard? So far I did not find a way to do it through CREMAS05 IDOC.

I have some workarounds in mind but they would include additional development.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to verify deleted entries from ARFCSDATA from SMQ1 and SM58?
Reforma tributária, RVABRA nota 3556404, off set?
entry.content:
Os bcset da nota 3556404 entregaram as condições CBS3, IB3S e IB3M amarradas as chaves de conta MWC, MWD, MWE.

Contudo, não foi criada sua respectiva off-set, para mapping na VKOA, gerando a perninha do recolher e do a pagar, sendo uma pela OB40 e outra pela VKOA.

Acreditam que a alguma razão fiscal, ou foi deixado para ser feito Z a gosto do cliente? 

Se estiver sendo ignorante me perdoem, pois me chamou a atenção ao fazer o paralelo entre MW2 e a BRI, por exemplo.

Abraços.

Eduardo

entry.title: Intercompany Code Subcontracting Process from perspective of Supplier
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community Members, can you please suggest Steps/Processes for following SAP Business Scenario

  1. Company A and Company B belong to same Group of Companies and have SAP implemented, but each of them has different company Codes.
  2. The Company B is Subcontracting Supplier of the Company A which is the Customer.
  3. What method can be used by Company B to do GR from Company A for Processing/Subcontracting.
  4. Also, the material received at Company B should only be updated Quantity wise in its stock. Since it is valuated stock for Company A.
  5. Once the material is processed at Company B what method can be used to dispatch the processed material from Company B to Company A. This should also consider the revision of stock.

Abstract: In short, what can be the process for Intercompany Code Subcontracting Process from the perspective of Supplier i.e. Company B?

Your suggestions are deeply appreciated.

entry.title: Business Partner as leading object in ECC
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently working on a preproject for and S/4HANA conversion and in doing so we need to activate the CVI.

As you probably know usually the BP will only get activated technically as it is a prerequisite for the conversion and the customer/supplier remain the leading object while still on ECC.

My client now requests to use the Business Partner as the leading object on ECC already, but I cannot find any documentation on that, nor do I have any experience with it.

Does anyone of you know if it is even possible to make use of the Business Partner as Customer/Supplier before going to S/4HANA and what the consequences would this have on the ECC system?

Hope you can help me out with this, thanks in advance.

 

Best regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: ECC INTRA-company stock transfer between different Company Codes.
entry.content:
Greetings -

Client requirement (due to NON-DEBATABLE/NEGOTIABLE Finance requirement) is to "cheat" standard SAP ECC STO process/functionality to transfer stock between two company codes as INTRA-company STO.

For example:

Plant=3100 in CC=3010 transfers stock to Plant=3900 in CC=3000.

Enhance/customize SAP ECC to "think" CC=3010 and CC=3000 are the same.

Has anyone designed/solutioned the above "special" business scenario as INTRA-company between different Company Codes?

Of course, no billing/invoice should be generated.

Client doesn't care if the solution is standard (obviously can NOT) or customized.

Thanks!

entry.title: Archiving suggested for JEST Table- need support
entry.content:
Hello Team,

SAP recommended to plan Archiving for JEST table. 

With reference to recommendation on archiving JEST table, we checked and observed that there are many objects present in JEST table which is connected with different modules (like MM, FICO, etc.)
Please suggest: Which objects in JEST table should we consider?

 

Regards,

BASIS Team.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Need assistance in transferring the net book value of Fixed asset
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

Could you please provide the process for transferring fixed assets to inventory after capitalizing and calculating depreciation for three years? We now need to transfer the net book value (NBV) to inventory.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: R3load exited with return code 6
entry.content:
Hello,
I'm exporting Oracle database with SAP R3load tool.

During export I have the following error:
Unloading of 'SAPAPPL0_32' export package is interrupted with R3load error.
Process '/sapmnt/PIP/exe/R3load -e SAPAPPL0_32.cmd -datacodepage 4103 -l SAPAPPL0_32.log -stop_on_error' exited with return code 6.
For mode details see 'SAPAPPL0_32.log' file.

The content of SAPAPPL0_32.log file is:
/sapmnt/PIP/exe/R3load: START OF LOG: 20250418150458
/sapmnt/PIP/exe/R3load: sccsid @(#) $Id: //bas/722_STACK/src/R3ld/R3load/R3ldmain.c#2 $ SAP
/sapmnt/PIP/exe/R3load: version R7.20/V1.6 [UNICODE]
Compiled Feb 25 2022 14:40:39
/sapmnt/PIP/exe/R3load -ctf E /backup/install/PIP_EXP/ABAP/DATA/SAPAPPL0_32.STR /backup/install/PIP_EXP/ABAP/DB/DDLORA_LRG.TPL SAPAPPL0_32.TSK ORA -l SAPAPPL0_32.log
(PRC) INFO: working directory "/tmp/sapinst_instdir/BS2010/ERP605/LM/COPY/ORA/EXP/DISTRIBUTED/AS/EXPDB"
(RTF) ########## WARNING ###########
Without ORDER BY PRIMARY KEY the exported data may be unusable for some databases
/sapmnt/PIP/exe/R3load: job completed

Does anybody know what R3load "return code 6" mean?
Could not find R3load return codes list.
Thank you.
